title: Fix UPI payment deep links to open correct payment apps

requirements.summary: Fix the UPI payment deep links in UpiPaymentButtons.tsx and UpiPaymentOptionsModal.tsx so that clicking GPay, PhonePe, and Paytm buttons opens the correct respective payment app instead of WhatsApp
acceptanceCriteria: Clicking the GPay button opens the GPay app (or GPay's UPI deep link URL) and does not open WhatsApp
Clicking the PhonePe button opens the PhonePe app (or PhonePe's UPI deep link URL) and does not open WhatsApp
Clicking the Paytm button opens the Paytm app (or Paytm's UPI deep link URL) and does not open WhatsApp
No other UI components, pages, or functionality are changed
The fix applies to both UpiPaymentButtons.tsx and UpiPaymentOptionsModal.tsx if both build deep links

file_operations.description: Update the UPI deep link URL construction to use the correct platform-specific URI schemes: 'tez://upi/pay?' for GPay, 'phonepe://pay?' for PhonePe, and 'paytmmp://pay?' for Paytm. Replace any incorrect URL schemes that are currently causing WhatsApp to open. Preserve all other functionality, UI layout, and styling.

Update the UPI deep link URL construction to use the correct platform-specific URI schemes: 'tez://upi/pay?' for GPay, 'phonepe://pay?' for PhonePe, and 'paytmmp://pay?' for Paytm. Replace any incorrect URL schemes that are currently causing WhatsApp to open. Preserve all other functionality, UI layout, modal behavior, and styling.
